---
title: "Schedule"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

**DRAFT: Will be revised in over the coming weeks..**


**Submit each of your homework answers, as an html file, via [this Google form](https://forms.gle/zzcXYPYiNNNwi8947) before midnight on the day before the class for which the homework was assigned.**


Key resources: [*Preceptor's Primer for Bayesian Data Science*](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/), [**vscode.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/vscode.tutorials/), and [**primer.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/tutorials/).

Always reinstall the relevant package before starting a new tutorial. Example:

```
remove.packages("vscode.tutorials")
remotes::install_github("PPBDS/vscode.tutorials")
```

**primer.tutorials** is a little trickier:

```
remove.packages("primer.tutorials")
remotes::install_github("PPBDS/primer", subdir = "primer.tutorials")
```

We are always fixing mistakes. You want to use the latest version.

If you do not complete the tutorials on time, you will be removed from the class. Send in your tutorial answers saved in *html* format. Please try to ensure that the name of the file is the default name, like `01-code_answers.html`. Avoid using the name which will be assigned to the file if you download the same answers twice (or more), stuff like `01-code_answers (2).html`. You can just change the name of the file by hand if this happens.


# Week 1: June 15

Introduction to the tools we use for doing data science.

## Monday 

**Monday's homework must be completed before midnight on Sunday**. I ensure this by only sending the Zoom link for class to students who submitted the homework.

* Read the Introduction from [*R for Data Science (2e)*](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/). 

* From the [**vscode.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/vscode.tutorials/) package, complete the "Code" (`01-code`) and "Quarto" (`02-quarto`) tutorials. Make sure that you have already completed the "Introduction to R" tutorial above before you starting these tutorials. We complete the tutorials from the [**vscode.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/vscode.tutorials/) in the order in which they appear.

## Wednesday

* From the [**vscode.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/vscode.tutorials/) package, complete the "Terminal" (`03-terminal`) tutorial.

**Reminder**: All work must be completed before class. Failure to submit your tutorial answers will result in you being removed from the course. It is not fair to your fellow students, with whom you will be working in small groups, for you to not be prepared for class.

## Thursday

* From the [**vscode.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/vscode.tutorials/) package, complete the "GitHub Introduction" (`04-github-1`) tutorial.


# Week 2: June 22

Finish learning about tools like Quarto and GitHub Pages. Start learning about models and inference.

## Monday 

* From the [**vscode.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/vscode.tutorials/) package, complete the "GitHub Advanced" (`05-github-2`) and "AI" (`06-ai`) tutorials.

## Wednesday

* From the [**misc.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/misc.tutorials/) package, complete the "R for Data Science 1" (`r4ds-1`) tutorial.


## Thursday

* From the [**vscode.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/vscode.tutorials/) package, complete the "Quarto Websites Introduction" (`07-websites-1`) tutorial.


# Week 3: June 29



## Monday

* From the [**misc.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/misc.tutorials/) package, complete the "R for Data Science 2" (`r4ds-2`) and "Census" (`census`) tutorials.

## Wednesday

* From the [**vscode.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/vscode.tutorials/) package, complete the "Quarto Websites Advanced" (`08-websites-2`) tutorial.

## Thursday

* Read [Chapter 1 Probability](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/01-probability.html) and complete the "Probability" tutorial from the [**primer.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/tutorials/) package.


# Week 4: July 6

## Monday

* From the [**vscode.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/vscode.tutorials/) package, complete the "Infrastructure" (`09-infrastructure`) tutorial.

* Read [Chapter 2 Sampling](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/02-sampling.html) and complete the "Sampling" tutorial from the [**primer.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/tutorials/) package.

## Wednesday

* Read [Chapter 3 Rubin Causal Model](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/03-rubin-causal-model.html) and complete the "Rubin Causal Model" tutorial from the [**primer.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/tutorials/) package.

## Thursday

* Read [Chapter 4 Cardinal Virtues](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/04-cardinal-virtues.html) and complete the "Cardinal Virtues" tutorial from the [**primer.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/tutorials/) package.


# Week 5: July 13

## Monday

* From the [**misc.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/misc.tutorials/) package, complete the "R for Data Science 3" (`r4ds-3`) tutorial.

## Wednesday

* Read [Chapter 5 Recruits](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/05-recruits.html) and complete the "Recruits" tutorial from the [**primer.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/tutorials/) package.

## Thursday

* From the [**misc.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/misc.tutorials/) package, complete the "R for Data Science 4" (`r4ds-4`) tutorial.


# Week 6: July 20

## Monday

* Read [Chapter 6 Trains](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/06-trains.html) and complete the "Trains" tutorial from the [**primer.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/tutorials/) package.

## Wednesday

* Read [Chapter 7 Colleges](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/07-colleges.html) and complete the "Colleges" tutorial from the [**primer.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/tutorials/) package.

## Thursday

* From the [**misc.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/misc.tutorials/) package, complete the "R for Data Science 5" (`r4ds-5`) tutorial.


# Week 7: July 27

## Monday

* Read [Chapter 8 Seguro Popular](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/08-sps.html) and complete the "Seguro Popular" tutorial from the [**primer.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/tutorials/) package.

## Wednesday

* Read [Chapter 9 Smokes](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/09-smokes.html) and complete the "Smokes" tutorial from the [**primer.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/tutorials/) package.

## Thursday

* Read [Chapter 10 Shaming](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/10-shaming.html) and complete the "Shaming" tutorial from the [**primer.tutorials**](https://ppbds.github.io/primer/tutorials/) package.



# Week 8: August 3

## Monday 

* You must have a draft of your final project, including a Quarto website. 

## Wednesday 

* Practice presentations and feedback. You must have your presentation ready to go! 

## Thursday 

* Final project presentations. You must invite someone, and bcc your TF when you do so.
